lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What animal did Jesus tell His disciples to go get?
What did the prophet say about the Messiah entering Jerusalem?
answers: He would ride in on a donkey
He would come with an army
He would arrive in a chariot

questions.text: What did the people put on the road as Jesus entered?
What did the people wave, as Jesus entered Jerusalem?

answers: Hosanna to the Son of David

questions.text: What did Jesus say would happen if people didn’t praise Him?
answers: The birds would tweet his praise

questions.text: What did Jesus do at the temple?
answers: Turned over tables and drove out sellers

questions.text: What miracles did Jesus do in Jerusalem?
answers: He healed the blind and those who couldn’t walk

questions.text: What did many people think the Messiah came to do?
answers: Defeat their enemies like the Romans

questions.text: What did Jesus actually come to do?
answers: Die to save us from our sins
Sit on a throne as king of the world
